_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of high value asset characteristics
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data and AI due diligence frameworks for mergers, acquisitions, and private equity transactions, including data asset valuation, technical debt assessment, key person risk evaluation, and integration complexity analysis.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI LS domain. Knowledge LS-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-001 (LS, cosine: 0.541), LS-K-007 (LS, cosine: 0.541).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.539). Shared vocabulary: [asset, knowledge]. NICE-only terms [characteristics, high, value] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisitions, ai, analysis, assessment, complexity, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.896, R=0.841). P exceeds R by 0.055 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 30 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Knowledge of high value asset characteristics" and "Knowledge of data and AI due diligence frameworks for mergers, acquisitions, and" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.553 ≈ STS 0.539 (gap 0.014). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [asset, knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [asset, knowledge]. NICE-only: [characteristics, high, value]. WIDAI-only: [acquisitions, ai, analysis, assessment, complexity, data].

signals.detail: STS 0.539 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
